place_ring_part_on_machine_spindle.query: the worker places a ring-shaped part with visible red-orange windings onto the central vertical machine spindle and winds the white line around it

arrange_white_cord_by_hand.query: the worker uses the fingers of both hands to guide and arrange the white cord between the windings of the ring-shaped part on the spindle

press_illuminated_control_switch.query: the worker holds the ring-shaped part with the left hand while pressing the illuminated switch on the right control panel with the right hand

reach_and_return_with_black_tweezers.query: the worker reaches the right arm above the control panel and returns to the ring-shaped part holding black tweezers

position_black_tweezers_at_white_cord.query: the worker brings the tip of black tweezers toward the white cord on the ring-shaped part and aligns the tip with the cord

tuck_white_cord_with_black_tweezers.query: the worker uses black tweezers and the fingers to push and arrange the white cord between the windings of the ring-shaped part

reach_toward_control_panel_top.query: the worker holds the ring-shaped part with the left hand while reaching the right hand toward the top of the control panel
